utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , there is uh , some people outside , askin about candy .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , they are just gonna have to wait are not they ? I have only got two hands ! !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No ! You do not know the system ! I do not need nobody messing with the system !
